meaning: adj.在水下的,在水中的adv.在水下,在水线以下n.(海洋等)水面下的水
examples: The boat finally grounded on a soft, underwater bank.
If the water's cloudy like that, it'll be hard to see anyone underwater.
Heedless of time or any other consideration, they began to search the underwater cave.
Meanwhile, Hennepin County Sheriff Rich Stanek has called the federal government for help in the underwater effort.
Of course, you will be forgiven if you wish to spend most of your waking hours underwater.
